center.name: 联邦直辖部落地区
center.summary: 联邦直辖部落地区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括青头鹦鹉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is can also be found in a small area north of Islamabad and in the southern areas of the Federally Administered Tribal Areas in Pakistan
